scope: VL corpus — 6 invoices, 51 aligned rows, 14 non-perfect-match rows, 7 financially significant error rows
methodology: Cross-verified persistence-audit (Pass C origin 100%), gpt-pattern-audit (error taxonomy), field-accuracy-audit, hallucination-audit, mammafiore-line-audit, geometry-audit. Focus: prompt design contribution only.

evidence: infer-from-name rule (L33-34) directly maps to 4 pack-multiplier errors
pack-24-bottles examples (L53-67, L80-84) teach *N-as-qty pattern generalized to CX*N
extract-all (L29) + no anti-phantom guard enables Mammafiore 9th row
copy-exactly vs infer contradiction creates unpredictable field authority
no-arithmetic-closure allows Ginger Beer semantic error to pass
GPT vision is sole OCR stage — no separate OCR pipeline
8 Aviludo May description-only character noise rows
Bocconcino price 25→20 persists despite correct qty in fresh extract
ocr.note: OCR here means GPT vision column reading, not Tesseract

evidence: Bocconcino qty=6 error occurred under postfix crop but qty=2 achievable post geometry fix — inference not geometry
Mammafiore phantom occurs AFTER geometry fix (crop top 386, 8/8 rows visible)
Historical Mammafiore 0/8 rows was geometry; not implicated in current error set
geometry.note: Geometry was prerequisite for extraction but not root cause of audited field errors

evidence: Non-determinism: phantom label varies (Olio Noc / Nute / Nui Lote 609) across runs
Column alignment on dense Italian/Portuguese price grids
Aceto/Rulo: same prompt sometimes yields qty=1 (fresh) sometimes qty=2 (raw)
8↔9 digit confusion awareness (L121) ineffective on Prosciutto

conclusion: Prompt design is the largest single contributor (~50%) to VL extraction errors, specifically via infer-from-name pack notation rules and absent anti-phantom guards. OCR/vision column misreads account for ~28%. Geometry is largely resolved and contributes ~7% to residual errors. Model non-determinism adds ~15%.
highestRoiChangeArea: Column-first extraction with pack-metadata disambiguation — read qty/unit_price/total strictly from visible columns; treat (CX 2.5KG*6), pet 5l*2, 1kg*2 as description metadata unless column qty is null AND pack notation matches retail bottle/case pattern with worked negative examples
